description: The image is a close-up photograph of a large, smooth, grey bedrock outcrop, consistent with the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) land cover class '6.3.1.0 Bare Rocks, outcrops, cliffs'. The rock surface is predominantly grey with visible lighter and darker areas, indicating natural texture and some faint linear cracks. A small tuft of green, grass-like vegetation is growing from a fissure near the apex of the upper rock formation. The background shows a clear, light blue sky.
